betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Basic Circuit Plate§f is the §6mid-tier circuit board§f that backs every §6Basic Circuit§f (advancedrocketry:ic:0) and §6Tracking Circuit§f (advancedrocketry:ic:1) in the AR progression. It is the first circuit board the player can produce and it gates the entire §6electronics§f questline.

§6Production Path (basiccircuitplate.json)§f:
- Machine: §6Precision Assembler§f (10012) at 900 ticks
- Input: 1x §6ingotGold§f (forge:ore_dict), 1x §6dustRedstone§f (forge:ore_dict), 1x §6Silicon Wafer§f (advancedrocketry:wafer:0)
- Output: 1x §6Basic Circuit Plate§f (advancedrocketry:itemcircuitplate:0)
- Energy: 100 RF/t
- Alternative: §6Precision Laser Etcher§f (basiccircuitplateetcher.json) at 1200 ticks, 400 RF/t, produces 2x plates per recipe using §6lensPrecisionLaserEtcher§f, §6plateGold§f, §6dustRedstone§f, 4x §6Silicon Wafer§f

The basic circuit plate is the §6input§f for the §6Basic Circuit§f (ic:0), the §6Tracking Circuit§f (ic:1), and the §6Control Circuit Board§f (ic:3) recipes. It is consumed at a §61:4 ratio§f by the §6Cutting Machine§f (basiccircuit.json) to produce §6Basic Circuits§f.

The basic circuit plate is a prerequisite for the §6Advanced Circuit Plate§f (10057), the §6Tracking Circuit§f (10058), and the §6Control Circuit Board§f (10059). It is one of the most-produced items in the AR progression because every machine uses control circuits.

§eTip§f: Use the §6Precision Laser Etcher§f (10015) recipe for §62x output§f — it is faster per-plate than the §6Precision Assembler§f (10012) recipe if you can supply 4 wafers and the §6lensPrecisionLaserEtcher§f lens module. Bulk-produce 32+ plates at a time to feed the §6Basic Circuit§f (10058/10059) chain.
